item.title: AMD 与 Anthropic 宣布战略合作，将部署高达 2 吉瓦的 AMD Instinct MI450 系列 GPU
item.summary: News Highlights - Anthropic to deploy up to 2 gigawatts of MI450 Series GPUs in AMD Helios rack-scale solutions, with deployment of the first gigawatt beginning in the first half of 2027 - The companies will collaborate to use Claude to optimize workloads for AMD Instinct GPUs and accelerate AMD ROCm development, and A
